title: Magical Gems
description: A 1.16 Minecraft mod about armors and potion effect
body: # Magical Gems: A mod for armor and potions. --- Magical Gems is a Minecraft 1.16 mod that lets you define the effects of potions on armor pieces. ### Gems Gems are items that add effects to armor. To add these effects, simply place your piece of armor and the gem in an anvil. ### Alchemy table The alchemy table is used to create gems. First, place a normal gem in the "Gem slot". Next, place the potion corresponding to the gem's effect or "essence". Finally, you'll need to put in enhanced fire powder as fuel. ### Distillery The distillery allows you to create potions that don't exist in the vanilla game, such as the haste potion. First, place an empty vial in the exit slot. Next, place the potion and the required item in the corresponding slots. Lastly, you'll need to use improved fire powder as fuel. --- Please credit me if you use my mod in some videos by adding the download link in the description. Please respect the license. Created by **Thanatos_0173** [CurseForge link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/magical-gems)
